name: Mesh Repair
author: Modly
description: Repairs mesh topology: removes duplicates, degenerate faces, fixes non-manifold edges, fills simple boundary holes.

params_schema.label: Remove Degenerate Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Remove zero-area faces and collapsed edges.

params_schema.label: Fill Holes
params_schema.tooltip: Fill simple boundary holes. Structural holes from AI generation may not be fillable in post-processing.

params_schema.label: Max Hole Size
params_schema.tooltip: Maximum number of boundary edges of a hole to be filled. Increase if large holes remain open.
